name: nexus-print-bridge
description: Nexus Print Connector - Local Hardware WebSocket Bridge

scripts.build: npm run prebuild && npx pkg server.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/assistente-impressao-nexus.exe
scripts.build:linux: npm run prebuild && npx pkg server.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output dist/assistente-impressao-nexus-linux
